reason: Existing skill-testing contracts, run evidence, case schema, and regression semantics

Runtime sandbox env, tool bridge, and prompt/tool mirrored update constraints

Implemented skill-test isolation driver contract, case-scoped writable worlds, Trellis fixture/snapshot handling, pollution checks, cleanup evidence, and isolation issue mapping.
Added env/config-backed OpenSandbox adapter that prepares remote case worlds and preserves sandbox resource evidence while failing closed when unavailable.
Threaded isolation options through run/run-all execution and persisted isolation evidence in evaluation JSON without breaking dynamic/full evaluation envelopes.
Added invocation-scoped store override and policy enforcement for tool allowlists, Trellis path rewriting, and reject evidence during isolated runs.
Wired optional OpenSandbox factory configuration into skill-test controller setup for explicit isolated backend enablement.
Added OpenSandbox SDK dependency path needed by the optional container-backed skill-test isolation adapter.
Added regressions for isolated case worlds, policy rejection, Trellis fixture routing, pollution failure, cleanup failure, and async OpenSandbox-backed execution.
Added schema coverage for isolation options and evidence envelopes.
Added bridge coverage for isolated store overrides and policy rejects.
Added unit coverage for configured OpenSandbox factory disabled mode, availability failure, remote world preparation, and evidence fields.

summary: Added skill-test chat bridge run/case binding, TTL validation, scoped agent-chat-tools payloads, and isolation chatBridge evidence for OpenSandbox direct-HTTP POC hardening.
